1: The Feast of the Holy Name of Jesus is celebrated on the Sunday between Jan 2-5, with appropriate commemorations. If Jan. 1 or Jan. 6 fall on a Sunday, then the Feast is celebrated on January 2 with a commemoration of the Octave of St Stephen.
2: When leap year occurs, the following adjustments are made: 24: Vigil (omitted in Septuagesimatide); 25: St Matthias; 26: St Walburga; 27: St Alexander; 28: St Raphael; 29: Feria
3: The Seven Sorrows of the BVM (Memorial) is commemorated on the Friday after Passion Sunday.
4: The Solemnity of St. Joseph, Spouse of the B.V.M. (D1 with a Simple Octave) is observed on the Wednesday after II Sunday after Easter. Further, the Octaves of St Tikhon & St George are kept only in Paschaltide, never in Lent or Easter Week.
6: All Saints of Antioch (memorial) are commemorated invariably on the II Sunday after Pentecost.
9: The Ember Days in September occur on the Wed., Fri., and Sat. after Sept. 14.
10: The Feast of Our Lord Jesus Christ the King is celebrated on the last Sunday in October.
